headline: Cognizant Technology Solutions (NASDAQ:CTSH) Offers a Compelling Mix of Dividend Growth and Financial Strength
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions offers a reliable 2% dividend yield, backed by strong earnings, a healthy balance sheet, and a history of dividend growth for income investors.
